evals.prompt: Deep web search academic and technical sources about LLM agent skill libraries and self-improving agents.
evals.expected_output: The agent should use the deep-web-search skill, choose the agent_skills profile, run or propose skills/deep-web-search/scripts/deep_web_search.py, and inspect the resulting bundle.

evals.prompt: I need an academic deep search for protein binder design with diffusion models, with evidence I can audit later.
evals.expected_output: The agent should use skills/deep-web-search/scripts/deep_web_search.py with the biomol profile and explain the generated bundle files, especially evidence and provenance records.

evals.prompt: Read this Deep Web Search bundle and tell me which sources support the main claim.
evals.expected_output: The agent should inspect bundle files in the recommended order and cite source_id or evidence_id rather than making unsupported claims.

evals.prompt: Find similar work to Rational engineering of allosteric protein switches by in silico prediction of domain insertion sites.
evals.expected_output: The agent should use the biomol profile, rely on mechanism-focused refinements such as domain insertion and synthetic allostery, and present a ranked similar-works table with source_id/evidence_id citations.
